findings.message: The revocation design explicitly fails open on missing/unhealthy KV. For an admin-only auth path, that weakens the core security outcome. Needs either fail-closed behavior in production or an explicit operator-approved tradeoff.

session_revoked log specifies { ip, issuedAt, minIssuedAt } from uploaderAuth.ts, but hasUploaderSessionFromCookieHeader() only receives a cookie string. Server-component callers do not pass request headers. Either the log drops ip, or plan needs extra signature/call-site changes.
Once-per-process coherence-warning dedupe missing test-isolation plan. Module-level flag persists across tests unless jest.resetModules() or test-only reset seam is added.
